title: Akshaj's Rubies
description: This mod adds the old ruby ores to minecraft with some interesting additions and recipes
body:
Akshaj’s Rubies

Adds a new ruby-based progression system to Minecraft with custom ores, materials, and gear.

Features:

Ruby Ore generates underground (similar depth to coal, with balanced rarity like lapis)
Ruby Gem crafting material
Full Ruby Armor set with custom textures
Ruby Tools (durable and stronger than iron, balanced for mid-game progression)

World Generation:

Spawns naturally in the Overworld
Most common in cave-exposed areas
Designed to feel like a natural vanilla extension

Compatibility:

Built for Fabric
Works alongside most vanilla-friendly mods

Why this mod?
If vanilla feels a bit dry after iron/diamond grind, this adds a simple but satisfying extra tier without overcomplicating the game.
